description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines the stages build, test and deploy, uses the variable DEFAULT_IMAGE set to erlang:22-alpine, and caches the rebar3 PLT files located under _build/default/rebar3_*_plt. In the build stage add a default-build job that runs `apk add --update make` then `make ci` on $DEFAULT_IMAGE, and always stores the ebin and doc directories as artifacts named `$CI_PROJECT_NAME-ci-${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME}` that expire after one month. Also in the build stage add a release job that runs only on tag pipelines, executes the same before_script and `make ci` on $DEFAULT_IMAGE, and publishes ebin and doc as artifacts named `$CI_PROJECT_NAME-${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME}`. In the test stage add jobs test:18, test:19, test:20, test:21, test:22 and test:dialyze, each using the specified Erlang Docker images (erlang:18, erlang:19, erlang:20-alpine, erlang:21-alpine, $DEFAULT_IMAGE) and running `make ci` (or `make ci-dialyze` for test:dialyze), with a before_script installing make where required. Finally, in the deploy stage add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, installs make, emacs, texinfo, ca-certificates and curl, runs `./install` inside the pages directory, then executes `make pages` and moves the output to a public folder, publishing the public directory as the pages artifact.
